title: 先輩よろしくお願いします！

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In today's social exchange, I encourage all
newcomers to speak freely with our more
seasoned students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to feel intimidated. You are here
to learn just as much as we are.

text_block_list.name: New Students
text_block_list.text: Uh... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you have a person in mind, by all means, take
the initiative. Are there any questions?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now then... Who wants to know the trendiest
places in the neighborhood? How abooout you?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll point you in the right direction! I've got top
knowledge on the swankiest discos and the
yummiest Italian spots!

text_block_list.name: New Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we can ask questions like that? Maruzen, I
wanna know!

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text: I-I'd like to talk with C.B.! C.B., over heeeere!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The new students are loosening up. I'm sure
Maruzensky and C.B. will fare just fine without
me.

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text:
After seeing you race, I thought I'd like to try
running with you one day! That's why I entered
Tracen Academy, C.B.!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Interesting... Would you like to try it now then?

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text: What?! Like, right now? But I'm not good enough yet...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you're passing up the chance? No
good. There's no telling if you'll get another.

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text: Oh... That's true, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to run, we should do something to
make it more fun.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How about a relay race, then? Us pairing up with
the newcomers would make for a fair match.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I like the sound of that!
Aren't you motivated now?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You'll be on my team! That way, we'll beat C.B.
together. ♪

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks so much! Wow, I'm going to run against
C.B!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I presumed something like this would
happen, so I secured permission to use the field
ahead of time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sure it wasn't because we all think alike?
Running's always on the menu!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So long as someone is willing to be on my team—

text_block_list.name: New Student C
text_block_list.text:
Um, ex-excuse me! If y-you don't mind, I'd like to
be on your team, President Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course I don't mind. And don't worry, the baton doesn't weigh a ton. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: New Student C
text_block_list.text: Uh... What?
